About Me

Data-driven problem
solver

I'm Federico Manotas, a Data Analyst and MS Computer Science student with a passion for transforming messy, complex datasets into clear stories that empower decision-makers.

My toolkit centers on Python, SQL, and Power BI — and I love bridging the gap between raw data and strategic action. From exploratory analysis to interactive dashboards, I make sure every insight is not just found but understood.

When I'm not wrangling DataFrames or optimizing queries, I'm exploring machine learning fundamentals and looking for the next interesting dataset to interrogate.

Featured Projects

🎉
🔗

Brazilian E-commerce Analysis

Deep EDA on Olist's dataset — uncovering patterns in customer behavior, sales trends, and logistics performance.

  • Explored 100k+ orders for customer behavior and sales patterns
  • Analyzed delivery KPIs and root causes of late deliveries
  • Built interactive Power BI dashboards for stakeholders
PythonPandasMatplotlibPower BIEDA
📊
🔗

Sales Performance Dashboard

End-to-end Power BI dashboard tracking revenue, margin, and pipeline health across regions and product lines.

  • Designed DAX measures and KPI cards for real-time decisions
  • Implemented drill-through pages for category deep dives
  • Reduced manual reporting time by 60% through automation
Power BIDAXSQLData Modeling
🧠
🔗

Customer Segmentation (ML)

RFM-based segmentation model using K-Means clustering to identify high-value customer groups.

  • Applied K-Means clustering to 50k customer records
  • Engineered RFM features: recency, frequency, monetary
  • Visualized cluster profiles with Seaborn for clear segments
PythonScikit-learnK-MeansSeaborn
